---
title: "test_pennyone_warden_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_warden_empire.ts"
loc: 72
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.80
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 5.68
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [before](file://node:test)
- [after](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [Warden](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/warden.js)
- [CompiledGraph](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/compiler.js)

### Exports
- `agentDir`
- `ledgerPath`
- `mockGraph`
- `warden`
- `ledger`
- `bounty`
- `healthy`
